name: meeting-to-tickets
description: Turn meeting transcripts into DevRev-ready ticket drafts with Mom's-Test rigor. Seven-stage pipeline: deterministic Python intake → meeting outline → per-chunk Mom's-Test extraction → cross-chunk reconciler → theme clustering → ticket drafting (PM-review markdown) → DevRev compactor (engineering-handoff markdown). Invariant checker enforces verbatim-quote provenance, AC traceability, walk-back coverage, and DevRev-canonical field shape.
